title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Swiggy Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Swiggy Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Swiggy Logistics! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Pimpri-Chinchwad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Swiggy Logistics:
Swiggy Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Logistics!
